description: User authentication flow with JWT tokens
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A[User] -->|POST /login| B[Auth Controller]
    B --> C{Validate credentials}
    C -->|Valid| D[Generate JWT]
    C -->|Invalid| E[Return 401]
    D --> F[Return token]
    F --> G[Client stores token]
    G -->|Subsequent requests| H[Middleware validates JWT]
    H -->|Valid| I[Process request]
    H -->|Expired| J[Refresh token flow]

description: CI/CD pipeline for Python microservice deployment
mermaid_code:
flowchart LR
    A[Developer push] --> B[GitHub Actions trigger]
    B --> C[Run tests]
    C -->|Pass| D[Build Docker image]
    C -->|Fail| E[Notify developer]
    D --> F[Push to registry]
    F --> G[Deploy to staging]
    G --> H{Manual approval}
    H -->|Approved| I[Deploy to production]
    H -->|Rejected| J[Rollback]

description: Order processing system with payment and inventory
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A[Customer places order] --> B[Validate cart]
    B --> C{Items in stock?}
    C -->|Yes| D[Reserve inventory]
    C -->|No| E[Notify out of stock]
    D --> F[Process payment]
    F -->|Success| G[Confirm order]
    F -->|Failed| H[Release inventory]
    G --> I[Send confirmation email]
    G --> J[Trigger fulfillment]

description: RAG pipeline for document question answering
mermaid_code:
flowchart LR
    A[User query] --> B[Embed query]
    B --> C[Vector similarity search]
    C --> D[ChromaDB]
    D --> E[Top-K chunks]
    E --> F[Assemble prompt]
    F --> G[LLM inference]
    G --> H[Generated answer]
    H --> I[Return to user]

description: Microservices event-driven architecture with message queue
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A[API Gateway] --> B[Order Service]
    B --> C[RabbitMQ]
    C --> D[Inventory Service]
    C --> E[Notification Service]
    C --> F[Analytics Service]
    D --> G[(Inventory DB)]
    E --> H[Email/SMS]

description: Repository pattern with generic base class
FastAPI application with database models and schemas
REST API request with authentication middleware
mermaid_code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant G as API Gateway
    participant A as Auth Service
    participant S as Service
    participant D as Database
    C->>G: GET /api/resource (Bearer token)
    G->>A: Validate token
    A-->>G: Token valid, user_id=123
    G->>S: Forward request
    S->>D: Query data
    D-->>S: Result set
    S-->>G: JSON response
    G-->>C: 200 OK

description: Database transaction with rollback on error
mermaid_code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant App
    participant DB as Database
    App->>DB: BEGIN TRANSACTION
    App->>DB: INSERT INTO orders
    DB-->>App: OK
    App->>DB: UPDATE inventory
    alt Success
        DB-->>App: OK
        App->>DB: COMMIT
    else Error
        DB-->>App: Error
        App->>DB: ROLLBACK
    end
